member.summary: Helper class to print the debug messages for debug purposes only.

member.summary: Write data to the debug scratchpad.

member.summary: Dump the scratchpad data to console and clear the scratchpad.

member.summary: Erase th scratchpad.

member.summary: Print the debug message.

member.summary: To handle the fuse data map conversion into Json and serves as boundary to Newtonsoft.JSON and StreamWriter.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.VirtualFuse.VirtualFuseDataMap.Interface.IVfJsonWriter.SerializeToFile(Prime.TestMethods.VirtualFuse.VirtualFuseDataMap.VirtualFuseDataMap,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Serialize the fuseDataMap into a json file. Location is to be handled by the implementation.
member.param: The fuse data map to be serialized.
The session context of the operation.
